---
title: "抛物线：反射的魔法"
subtitle: "模块一 · 第4课"
date: 2026-03-22
---

卫星天线为什么是抛物面？因为所有信号都会汇聚到焦点。这个看似简单的性质，背后是抛物线最美的几何秘密：曲线上任何一点到焦点的距离，恰好等于它到一条直线（准线）的距离。

## 探索问题

::: {.callout-tip}
## 先想一想

想象你站在一个空旷的场地上。场地的一侧有一面墙（一条直线），场地中央有一根柱子（一个点）。

你想找到这样一个位置：你到墙的距离恰好等于你到柱子的距离。

1. 这样的位置只有一个吗？还是有很多个？
2. 所有这样的位置连起来，会形成什么形状？
3. 如果柱子离墙更远，这个形状会怎么变？
:::

## 几何直觉：抛物线的定义

### 动画1：焦点到准线的等距性质

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_para_equidist"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_para_equidist_info">拖动抛物线上的蓝色点 P</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 450, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 60};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_para_equidist").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const p = 100; // focal parameter in pixels
  const focusX = w / 2 + p / 2;
  const focusY = h / 2;
  const directrixX = w / 2 - p / 2;

  // Coordinate axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", h / 2).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", h / 2)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // Directrix
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", directrixX).attr("y1", 0)
    .attr("x2", directrixX).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#9b59b6").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("stroke-dasharray", "8,4");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", directrixX - 10).attr("y", 20)
    .attr("text-anchor", "end").attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#9b59b6")
    .attr("font-weight", "bold").text("准线 l");

  // Focus
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", focusX).attr("cy", focusY).attr("r", 6).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", focusX + 12).attr("y", focusY + 5)
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F");

  // Parabola: y² = 4f·x where f = p/2 = distance from vertex to focus
  // In pixel coords: vertex at (vertexX, focusY), focus at (focusX, focusY)
  // So f = p/2 = 50 pixels. For a point P on the parabola at vertical offset yOff:
  // xOff = yOff² / (4·f) = yOff² / (2·p)
  const vertexX = (focusX + directrixX) / 2;
  const f = p / 2; // vertex-to-focus distance in pixels
  const paraPts = d3.range(-220, 221, 2).map(yOff => {
    const xOff = (yOff * yOff) / (4 * f);
    return [vertexX + xOff, focusY + yOff];
  }).filter(d => d[0] < w + 20 && d[1] > -20 && d[1] < h + 20);
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(paraPts))
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5);

  // Lines
  const lineToFocus = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  const lineToDirectrix = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  const perpDot = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 4).attr("fill", "#27ae60");

  const distFLabel = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#e67e22").attr("font-weight", "bold");
  const distDLabel = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#27ae60").attr("font-weight", "bold");

  const equalDisplay = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "18px").attr("font-weight", "bold").attr("fill", "#2d70b3");

  const equalNote = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 55).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#888");

  const pointP = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 10).attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("stroke", "white").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("cursor", "pointer");
  const pointLabel = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "16px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("font-weight", "bold").text("P");

  function updateP(px, py) {
    // Snap to parabola: given py, compute px using y² = 4f·x
    const eyC = Math.max(30, Math.min(h - 30, py));
    const yOff = eyC - focusY;
    const xOff = (yOff * yOff) / (4 * f);
    const exC = vertexX + xOff;

    pointP.attr("cx", exC).attr("cy", eyC);
    pointLabel.attr("x", exC + 15).attr("y", eyC - 10);

    // Line to focus
    lineToFocus.attr("x1", focusX).attr("y1", focusY).attr("x2", exC).attr("y2", eyC);

    // Line to directrix (horizontal)
    lineToDirectrix.attr("x1", exC).attr("y1", eyC).attr("x2", directrixX).attr("y2", eyC);
    perpDot.attr("cx", directrixX).attr("cy", eyC);

    const dF = Math.sqrt((exC - focusX) ** 2 + (eyC - focusY) ** 2);
    const dD = exC - directrixX;

    const unit = f; // normalize distances by focal distance
    distFLabel.attr("x", (focusX + exC) / 2 + 10).attr("y", (focusY + eyC) / 2 - 8)
      .text(`${(dF / unit).toFixed(2)}`);
    distDLabel.attr("x", (exC + directrixX) / 2).attr("y", eyC - 10)
      .text(`${(dD / unit).toFixed(2)}`);

    const equal = Math.abs(dF - dD) < 0.5;
    equalDisplay.text(`|PF| = ${(dF / unit).toFixed(2)},  |Pl| = ${(dD / unit).toFixed(2)}`);
    equalNote.text(equal ? "始终相等！✓" : "始终相等！✓");

    document.getElementById("m1_para_equidist_info").textContent =
      `|PF| = ${(dF / unit).toFixed(2)}, 到准线距离 = ${(dD / unit).toFixed(2)}` +
      (equal ? " ✓ 相等" : "");
  }

  pointP.call(d3.drag().on("drag", function(event) { updateP(event.x, event.y); }));
  updateP(vertexX + f, focusY + 2 * f);
})();
</script>
```

拖动蓝色点 P 在抛物线上移动。无论 P 在哪里，它到焦点 F 的距离和到准线 $l$ 的距离**始终相等**。这就是抛物线的定义：到定点和定直线等距的点的轨迹。

### 动画2：光线反射——为什么卫星天线是抛物面

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_para_reflect"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <button id="m1_reflect_fire">发射光线 ▶</button>
  <button id="m1_reflect_reverse">反向：平行光 → 焦点</button>
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_reflect_info">点击按钮观察光线反射</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 450, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_para_reflect").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const p = 120;
  const focusX = w * 0.35;
  const focusY = h / 2;
  const vertexX = focusX - p / 2;
  const scale = p / 2;

  // Parabola
  const paraPts = d3.range(-3.0, 3.01, 0.04).map(t => {
    return [vertexX + t * t * scale / 2, focusY + t * scale];
  });
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(paraPts))
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5);

  // Axis
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", focusY).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", focusY)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1).attr("stroke-dasharray", "4,4");

  // Focus
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", focusX).attr("cy", focusY).attr("r", 7)
    .attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("stroke", "white").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  svg.append("text").attr("x", focusX).attr("y", focusY - 15)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle").attr("font-size", "15px").attr("fill", "#c74440")
    .attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F (焦点)");

  const raysGroup = svg.append("g");

  // Ray angles from focus
  const rayAngles = [-50, -35, -20, -10, 0, 10, 20, 35, 50].map(d => d * Math.PI / 180);

  function fireFromFocus() {
    raysGroup.selectAll("*").remove();
    document.getElementById("m1_reflect_info").textContent = "从焦点出发的光线 → 反射后变成平行光";

    rayAngles.forEach((angle, i) => {
      const t = Math.tan(angle) * 2;
      const hitX = vertexX + t * t * scale / 2;
      const hitY = focusY + t * scale;

      // Ray from focus to parabola
      const ray1 = raysGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", focusX).attr("y1", focusY)
        .attr("x2", focusX).attr("y2", focusY)
        .attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("opacity", 0.8);

      // Reflected ray (horizontal, going right)
      const ray2 = raysGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", hitX).attr("y1", hitY)
        .attr("x2", hitX).attr("y2", hitY)
        .attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("opacity", 0.8);

      // Animate
      ray1.transition().delay(i * 100).duration(400)
        .attr("x2", hitX).attr("y2", hitY);

      ray2.transition().delay(i * 100 + 400).duration(400)
        .attr("x2", w).attr("y2", hitY);

      // Hit dot
      raysGroup.append("circle")
        .attr("cx", hitX).attr("cy", hitY).attr("r", 0)
        .attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
        .transition().delay(i * 100 + 350).duration(200).attr("r", 4);
    });
  }

  function fireFromParallel() {
    raysGroup.selectAll("*").remove();
    document.getElementById("m1_reflect_info").textContent = "平行光 → 反射后全部汇聚到焦点（卫星天线原理）";

    const tValues = [-2.5, -1.8, -1.2, -0.6, 0, 0.6, 1.2, 1.8, 2.5];

    tValues.forEach((t, i) => {
      const hitX = vertexX + t * t * scale / 2;
      const hitY = focusY + t * scale;

      // Parallel ray from right
      const ray1 = raysGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", w).attr("y1", hitY)
        .attr("x2", w).attr("y2", hitY)
        .attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("opacity", 0.8);

      // Reflected to focus
      const ray2 = raysGroup.append("line")
        .attr("x1", hitX).attr("y1", hitY)
        .attr("x2", hitX).attr("y2", hitY)
        .attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("opacity", 0.8);

      ray1.transition().delay(i * 80).duration(400)
        .attr("x2", hitX).attr("y2", hitY);

      ray2.transition().delay(i * 80 + 400).duration(400)
        .attr("x2", focusX).attr("y2", focusY);

      raysGroup.append("circle")
        .attr("cx", hitX).attr("cy", hitY).attr("r", 0)
        .attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
        .transition().delay(i * 80 + 350).duration(200).attr("r", 4);
    });
  }

  document.getElementById("m1_reflect_fire").addEventListener("click", fireFromFocus);
  document.getElementById("m1_reflect_reverse").addEventListener("click", fireFromParallel);
})();
</script>
```

点击"发射光线"：从焦点出发的光线碰到抛物面后，反射光全部变成平行光。点击"反向"：平行光碰到抛物面后，全部汇聚到焦点。这就是卫星天线、手电筒、汽车大灯的工作原理。

## 生活中的曲线

::: {.callout-note}
## 抛物线在生活中

- **卫星天线**：抛物面将遥远的平行信号汇聚到焦点处的接收器
- **汽车大灯**：灯泡放在焦点，反射出平行光束，照得更远
- **太阳灶**：抛物面将太阳光聚焦到一点，温度可达数百度
- **拱桥**：悬索桥的主缆在均匀载荷下呈抛物线形（注意：自重下是悬链线）
- **喷泉的水柱**：在重力作用下形成抛物线轨迹
- **篮球投篮的弧线**：忽略空气阻力就是抛物线
:::

## Desmos探索

```{=html}
<div id="m1_04_desmos" class="desmos-container"></div>
<script src="https://www.desmos.com/api/v1.9/calculator.js?apiKey=dcb31709b452b1cf9dc26972add0fda6"></script>
<script>
  var m1_04_calc = Desmos.GraphingCalculator(document.getElementById('m1_04_desmos'), {
    expressions: true, settingsMenu: false
  });
  m1_04_calc.setExpression({ id: 'p', latex: 'p = 1', sliderBounds: { min: 0.2, max: 3, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_04_calc.setExpression({ id: 'para', latex: 'x = \\frac{y^2}{4p}', color: '#2d70b3' });
  m1_04_calc.setExpression({ id: 'focus', latex: '(p, 0)', color: '#c74440', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 8 });
  m1_04_calc.setExpression({ id: 'directrix', latex: 'x = -p', color: '#9b59b6', lineStyle: 'DASHED' });
  m1_04_calc.setExpression({ id: 'vertex', latex: '(0, 0)', color: '#388c46', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 6 });
  m1_04_calc.setMathBounds({ left: -5, right: 8, bottom: -5, top: 5 });
</script>
```

调节参数 $p$，观察焦点和准线如何移动。$p$ 越大，抛物线的开口越大，焦点离顶点越远。

## 参考视频

```{=html}
<div class="video-switch">
  <button class="active" onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-bilibili').classList.add('active')">B站原版</button>
  <button onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-github').classList.add('active')">GitHub镜像</button>
</div>
<div class="video-panel">
  <div class="video-source vs-bilibili active">
    <div class="video-container"><iframe src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV14WDAYQEyy&page=1" scrolling="no" border="0" frameborder="no" framespacing="0" allowfullscreen="true" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;"></iframe></div>
  </div>
  <div class="video-source vs-github">
    <div class="video-container">
      <video controls preload="metadata" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;">
        <source src="https://github.com/ymote/conics/releases/download/v1.0/09_.mp4" type="video/mp4">
      </video>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 关键帧

![抛物线的焦点与准线](../images/ch09/frame_01.jpg)

![到焦点和准线的等距性质](../images/ch09/frame_02.jpg)

![抛物线的反射性质](../images/ch09/frame_03.jpg)

![卫星天线的抛物面](../images/ch09/frame_04.jpg)

## 高考真题

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2020年 全国I卷 第5题

已知抛物线 $C: y^2=4x$ 的焦点为 $F$，直线 $l$ 过 $F$ 且与 $C$ 交于 $A, B$ 两点。若 $|AF|=3$，则 $|BF|=$（　　）

A. $\dfrac{3}{2}$ 　B. $\dfrac{3}{4}$ 　C. $\dfrac{4}{3}$ 　D. $\dfrac{3}{5}$

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

$y^2=4x$ 中 $2p=4$，$p=2$，焦点 $F(1,0)$。

焦半径公式：$|AF|=x_A+\dfrac{p}{2}=x_A+1=3$，所以 $x_A=2$。

代入 $y^2=4x$：$y_A^2=8$，$y_A=\pm 2\sqrt{2}$。

过焦点的直线与抛物线交于 $A, B$，利用抛物线焦点弦性质：
$$\frac{1}{|AF|}+\frac{1}{|BF|}=\frac{2}{p}=\frac{2}{2}=1$$

所以 $\dfrac{1}{|BF|}=1-\dfrac{1}{3}=\dfrac{2}{3}$，$|BF|=\dfrac{3}{2}$。

**答案：A**
:::
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2019年 全国II卷 第8题

已知抛物线 $C: y^2=2px\ (p>0)$ 的准线为 $l$，$A$ 是 $C$ 上的一点，$F$ 为焦点。已知 $A$ 到 $l$ 的距离为 $10$，$|AF|=10$，$|OF|=1$（$O$ 为原点），则 $p=$（　　）

A. $1$ 　B. $2$ 　C. $4$ 　D. $8$

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

抛物线的焦点 $F\left(\dfrac{p}{2}, 0\right)$，$|OF|=\dfrac{p}{2}=1$，所以 $p=2$。

验证：准线为 $x=-1$，$A$ 到准线距离等于 $|AF|=10$，满足抛物线定义 ✓

**答案：B**
:::
:::

## 本课要点

::: {.callout-important}
## 记住这些

1. **抛物线的定义**：平面上到一个定点（焦点）和一条定直线（准线）距离相等的点的轨迹
2. 抛物线只有**一个焦点**，这和椭圆、双曲线（两个焦点）不同
3. **反射性质**：从焦点出发的光线，经抛物面反射后变成平行光；反过来，平行光汇聚到焦点
4. 抛物线的离心率恒等于 $e=1$，是椭圆（$e<1$）和双曲线（$e>1$）的分界线
:::
